headline: Netflix Stock Sinks To 52-Week Low — What's Going On?
summary: Netflix ($NFLX) hits a new 52-week low at $71.82 as failed M&A bids, including a $22B loss to Fox for Roku, spark investor anxiety.

headline: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (WBD) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.
